case_title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IVY GETTY IRREVOCABLE TRUST, U/A/D APRIL 23, 1996
cause_of_action: TRUST (petition for order modifying trust and confirming actions of predecessor trustee)

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR ORDER MODIFYING TRUST AND CONFIRMING ACTIONS OF PREDECESSOR TRUSTEE (ORIGINAL DOCUMENT FILED UNDER SEAL PURSUANT TO COURT ORDER FILED JULY 28, 2011) FILED BY PETITIONER NAGLE, TAYLOR AS TO TRUSTOR IVY GETTY IRREVOCABLE TRUST HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 204

REDACTED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER SEALING (ORIGINAL DOUCMENT FILED UNDER SEAL PURSUANT TO COURT ORDER FILED JULY 28, 2011), CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2011 NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR ORDER SEALING COURT RECORDS IS GRANTED SUBJECT TO THE APPOINTMENT OF A GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR THE MINOR, IVY GETTY. THE COURT WILL APPOINT A GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR THE MINOR. THE PURPOSE OF THE APPOINTMENT IS FOR THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM TO REVIEW THE UNREDACTED PETITION FOR ORDER MODIFYING TRUST AND CONFIRMING ACTIONS OF PREDECESSOR TRUSTEE PRIOR TO THE AUGUST 29, 2011 HEARING ON SAID PETITION. IN ADDITION, THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM IS FURTHER AUTHORIZED TO REPRESENT THE MINOR ON SAID PETITION.
